title: Rubrics, Model Judges, Pairwise Comparison, Human Calibration, and Uncertainty · Behavior Case: Task Rubric
summary: A judge model sees model names, produces unexplained one-to-five scores, agrees with itself, replaces human review, and silently overrides deterministic safety failures. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the task rubric increment in calibrated mixed-method evaluation board. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Define observable task-specific criteria, anchors, critical failures, accessibility, safety, evidence, and scoring aggregation before viewing candidate outputs.
Assess complete, refuse, escalate, exhausted, cancelled, failed, partial, rollback, and recovery outcomes under injected faults.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-task-rubric — Define observable task-specific criteria, anchors, critical failures, accessibility, safety, evidence, and scoring aggregation before viewing candidate outputs.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-rubrics-judge-calibration-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-rubrics-judge-calibration-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_rubrics_judge_calibration_5(rubric_cases: int = 60, blinded_cases: int = 60, human_calibration_cases: int = 18, disagreement_cases: int = 7, silent_overrides: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if rubric_cases < 30 or blinded_cases != rubric_cases:
        return False, blinded_cases, "rubric-blinding"
    if human_calibration_cases < 12:
        return False, human_calibration_cases, "human-calibration"
    if disagreement_cases < 1:
        return False, disagreement_cases, "judge-disagreement"
    if silent_overrides > 0:
        return False, silent_overrides, "silent-judge-override"
    assert blinded_cases == rubric_cases and silent_overrides == 0
    return True, human_calibration_cases, "calibrated-agent-judgment"

        "authorityjix11i",
        "interaction8297",
        "tooli11xij",
        "statejix11i8297",
        "evaluation8297jix11i",
        "recoveryi11xij8297",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_jix11i)) == 6
    if rubric_cases < 30 or blinded_cases != rubric_cases:
        return False, blinded_cases, "rubric-blinding"
    if human_calibration_cases < 12:
        return False, human_calibration_cases, "human-calibration"
    if disagreement_cases < 1:
        return False, disagreement_cases, "judge-disagreement"
    if silent_overrides > 0:
        return False, silent_overrides, "silent-judge-override"
    assert blinded_cases == rubric_cases and silent_overrides == 0
    return True, human_calibration_cases, "calibrated-agent-judgment"
